log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aarakocra — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aarakocra — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aarakocra — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 16 damage. Aarakocra — Armored Escapist HP: 43/59
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Aarakocra — Armored Escapist HP: 24/59
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 11 damage. Aarakocra — Armored Escapist HP: 13/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aarakocra — Armored Escapist --- HP: 13/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (13/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Aarakocra — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aarakocra — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aarakocra — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 20] MISS.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Aarakocra — Armored Escapist --- HP: 13/59 | AC: 20 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 175/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 175/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aarakocra — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aarakocra — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 20] HIT! 18 damage. Aarakocra — Armored Escapist HP: -5/59
→ Concentration save: [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
